name: Strawberry-Filled Lemon Cream Cheese Bars
recipeIngredient: Pillsbury Moist Supreme Lemon Cake Mix, 1 pkg
recipeInstructions:
Cream cheese, softened, 8 oz
Sugar, 1/4 cup
Flour, Pillsbury Best, 1/4 cup
Salt, 1/8 tsp
Egg, 1
Frozen concentrated margarita mix (thawed), 1/2 cup
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 13 x 9-inch pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix and softened butter. Cut in until crumbly. Add almonds and mix well. Set aside 1 cup of this mixture for topping.
3. Press remaining mixture into the bottom of the greased pan. Stir preserves until smooth and carefully spread over the base.
4. In the same bowl, beat together cream cheese, sugar, flour, salt, and egg until well blended. Gradually add thawed margarita mix, beating at low speed until combined. Carefully pour this mixture over the base.
5. Sprinkle reserved cake mixture on top. Bake for 35 to 45 minutes or until edges begin to brown and center is set. Let cool for 1 hour or until completely cooled. Cut into bars. Store in refrigerator. Makes 32 bars.
